nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated toucan
nodes.summary: Yellow-throated toucan（Yellow-throated toucan，学名 Ramphastos ambiguus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于原始森林、Gallery forest、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: swainsonii primarily inhabits lowland evergreen primary forest and also occurs in gallery forest, older secondary forest, and well-treed parks and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The two "black-mandibled" subspecies are usually found in the interior of humid primary montane forest but also occur at its edges and clearings and in older secondary forest. In Ecuador the "chestnut-mandibled" is found from sea level to , in Colombia below , and in Costa Rica to

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The major threat is continuing conversion of its forest habitat to agriculture and ranching; hunting is also a threat. "Yellow-throated Toucan is able to tolerate some human disturbance and forest alteration, but is nonetheless affected greatly by habitat loss."
